scope.outcome: Products self-improve daily. Builder spends time on ideas and feedback, not code.
scope.vision: Every product I build gets better on its own, every day. I spend my time having ideas and giving feedback. The system handles the rest.

facts: One backlog is the single place for all ideas
External research feeds the backlog automatically
Ideas need inline sparring to avoid misunderstandings
assumptions: 5am DK execution = cheaper tokens + evening results
Cadence TBD — daily, every other day, or weekly
Async Discord channels work for idea refinement
beliefs: System should be self-directing — evals guide, human curates
Ideas that don't map to evals signal eval gaps, not bad ideas
